user.title: Connect to Suno
user.description:
Enter your Suno session cookie.  To get it:

1. Open https://suno.com and log in
2. Open DevTools (F12) then the Network tab
3. Click any request to suno.com
4. Copy the full Cookie header value from the request headers

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Suno
reauth_confirm.description: Your Suno session has expired.  Please paste a fresh cookie from your browser.

error.invalid_cookie: Could not authenticate.  Check your cookie is correct and not expired.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Suno.  Check your network connection.

abort.already_configured: This Suno account is already configured.

auth_expired.title: Suno authentication expired
auth_expired.description: Your Suno session cookie has expired.  Open the integration settings to re-authenticate.
